description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style red sedan with a two-door configuration and a sloping rear hatch. The body is painted in a matte red finish, with black-tinted windows and a black sunroof on the roof. The front features a chrome grille and rectangular headlights, while the rear has a simple bumper and tail lights. The wheels are metallic with a utilitarian, multi-spoke design, and the car sits low to the ground. Subtle details such as door handles, side mirrors, and a visible fuel cap add to its realism. The overall design suggests a late 1970s to early 1980s European or Japanese make, with a focus on practicality and compactness.
description: A compact, vintage red two-door sedan with black-tinted windows, chrome grille, and metallic multi-spoke wheels. The car features a matte finish and a sloping rear hatch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-door configuration, black-tinted windows, and the sloping rear hatch.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the chrome grille, rectangular headlights, and the black sunroof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the wheels and door details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the simple bumper, tail lights, and the rear window.
attribute_license_plate: rear: silver/gray, no readable text; front: silver/gray, no readable text
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke metallic wheels with a simple, utilitarian design and dark central hub
